<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. A few minutes filling this out saves a lot of
back-and-forth. Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #123, refs #456, or "n/a" for trivial cleanups. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe what you actually exercised, not what the tooling could
exercise in theory. "Drove board → backlog → sprint complete on a
local OP 14 with three open versions" beats "tested manually".
-->

## UI changes — screenshot or recording

<!--
For any user-visible change, drop a before/after screenshot or a 10s
screen recording. This is the single biggest review accelerator.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally.
- [ ] I read the relevant section of [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I'm not changing public API shape without flagging it in the description.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env*` content in the diff.
